text: New engineers get repo access on day one. IT provisions a laptop before the start date. A buddy is assigned for the first two weeks.
The onboarding checklist covers VPN setup, Slack channels, and the internal wiki. Managers review it with the new hire during week one.
Annual leave accrues at 1.5 days per month. Unused leave carries over up to ten days into the next year.
Sick leave requires no advance notice for absences under three days. Longer absences need a manager approval and a doctor's note.
Parental leave is twelve weeks paid for the primary caregiver and four weeks paid for the secondary caregiver.
Travel expenses are reimbursed within fourteen business days of submitting a receipt through the expense portal.
Meals during business travel are capped at fifty dollars per day. Alcohol is not reimbursable.
Home office equipment up to three hundred dollars is reimbursed once per calendar year with a manager's sign-off.
All laptops must have full-disk encryption enabled before connecting to the production VPN.
Passwords rotate every ninety days. Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all internal tools.
Suspected phishing emails should be forwarded to security@company.example and then deleted, never clicked.
Production deploys require two approvals and must pass the full CI suite before merging to main.
Rollbacks are triggered automatically if error rates exceed two percent within five minutes of a deploy.
Database migrations run in a separate step from application deploys and are always backward compatible for one release.
On-call rotations are weekly, starting Monday at nine AM. Engineers are compensated with a flat stipend plus overtime for pages after hours.
A page that is not acknowledged within fifteen minutes automatically escalates to the secondary on-call engineer.
Performance reviews happen twice a year, in March and September. Self-assessments are due one week before the review.
Promotion packets require two peer reviews and one manager sponsor, submitted at least a month before the calibration meeting.
Fully remote employees can work from any timezone within four hours of the team's core hours, which are ten AM to two PM Eastern.
Co-working space stipends are available up to two hundred dollars a month for employees without a dedicated home office.
